_meta.notes: Vessel target at 62m in docking-HUD range (<100m). vessel.dock.relativePosition is a near-boresight offset, so the derived line-of-sight angles (deriveDockAngles) are both < 1°; forwardDot 0.9999 marks it aligned so the reticle renders green. Negative radial rate = closing slowly. HUD mode forced to 'hud' (no camera) to avoid the kerbcast dependency.
